---
title: Georges Brassens
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784037598/georgesbrassens_x4ffrx.png
description: au parc Georges Brassens Paris 15
categories: ["urbansketch"]
date: 2026/07/06
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784037598/georgesbrassens_x4ffrx.png)
